fields.eeatNarrative: Death Bubba, bred by Matteo Suleyman of Vancouver BC's Sea to Sky, is a beautiful, purple-hued strain with trichromes and terpenes abound. Created by crossing Death Star and Bubba Kush, this pungent pairing reeks of grass and skunk while the smoke is sweet, earthy, and clean on the palate. Its semi-sedative effects lock the consumer to the couch, unknotting tension and soothing minor physical discomfort with ease. This stinky BC native has been serving cannabis enthusiasts since 2012 and was most recently smelled off Fraser St. the Vancouver metro area.

From the very first encounter, these feminized seeds pledge a symphony of flavors and effects, redefining the cannabis experience.LA Kush Cake Feminized Seeds: Bud BasicsExplore the art of cultivating LA Kush CakeГўВҖВ”an indulgence in elegance and sensory delight. This indica-dominant beauty, boasting a THC content of 18-20%, orchestrates a therapeutic dance of arousal, relaxation, and tranquil sleep, delivering relief for anxiety, depression, and pain.EffectsDelve into the exquisite effects of LA Kush Cake, where each puff becomes a journey into euphoric bliss. With its tantalizing blend of vanilla, mint, pepper, sour, and skunk flavors, this strain is a celebration of the sensesГўВҖВ”a true expression of genetic sophistication.Growing LA Kush Cake SeedsCultivating LA Kush Cake Seeds is an art form where photoperiod wonders gracefully thrive indoors and outdoors, embracing warm climates with poise. As a beginner-friendly option resistant to pests and diseases, LA Kush Cake unfurls its genetic magic with each growth stage, including the delightful flowering weeks spanning 8-9 weeks.Delight in the world of LA Kush Cake Feminized Seeds, a genetic masterpiece merging Wedding Cake and Kush Mints. Elevate your cannabis garden with the captivating blend of flavors, allowing LA Kush Cake to take center stageГўВҖВ”a living masterpiece that transcends the ordinary. Results will always vary based on how and where itГўВҖВҷs grown.

fields.lineage: to make it heartier
fields.eeatNarrative: Alaskan Thunder Fuck (also referred to as ATF, Matanuska Thunder Fuck or Matanuska Tundra) is a legendary sativa-dominant strain originating in the Matanuska Valley area of Alaska. According to the legend, it was originally a Northern California sativa crossed with a Russian ruderalis, but sometime in the late 70s it was crossed with Afghani genetics to make it heartier. ATF usually presents large, beautifully frosted buds with incredibly strong odors of pine, lemon, menthol, and skunk. Known for possessing a relaxing yet intensely euphoric high, it is also described as having a вҖңcreeperвҖқ effect as well as pronounced appetite enhancement.

Atomic Goat is a Seattle-born staple that came about in 2010 when a Chernobyl male pollinated a Golden Goat clone. This hybrid offspring inherits a sweet herbal aroma likened to that of sage as well as a heavy coat of crystal trichomes that often push Atomic Goat past the 20% THC mark. Although Atomic Goat induces deep relaxation of the mind and body, it allows enough energy to shine through to justify its daytime use.

fields.lineage: Cherry Pie x GSC(F2) This pheno has the best flavor of all the cookies! Very fragrant and sticky
fields.eeatNarrative: Birthday Cake Cannabis Seeds by Purple Caper Seeds Genetics: Cherry Pie x GSC(F2) This pheno has the best flavor of all the cookies! Very fragrant and sticky. Tastes like Cherry Cookies. These plants are easy to trim and make great hash. This is personal and special occasion medicine. 1.25 lbs per 1,000w indoors, great outdoors as well

fields.lineage: your tongue
fields.eeatNarrative: Biscotti Feminized seeds boast indica-dominant hybrid genes. This average-yielding strain offers a mellow high and may relieve varying health issues. ItГўВҖВҷs moderately easy to grow as long as you optimize the environmental conditions.What is the origin of these weed seeds? How can you germinate and grow them to promote maximum yields? These are the critical things to know before attempting cultivation. Dive in to learn more about Biscotti fem seeds.What are Biscotti feminized cannabis seeds and their origin?Feminized Biscotti seeds are produced by crossing Gelato 25 and Sour Florida OG. The strain boasts 21% THC and 0% CBD. The cultivarГўВҖВҷs primary terpenes are caryophyllene, limonene, and myrcene. It also features linalool and pinene.The Biscotti strain is an indica-dominant hybrid. The sativa genetics account for only 20%. Indoor cultivation is heavy-yielding, producing about 17 oz./m2. When grown outdoors, the harvest is around 10ГўВҖВ“12 oz./plant.Regardless of the cultivation settings, Biscotti plants have average height. Under the right conditions, they can grow up to 6.5 feet.Germination of Biscotti feminized seedsThe paper towel method is an effective technique for germinating Biscotti feminized seeds. ItГўВҖВҷs a simple and easy-to-monitor way to sprout seeds. Get distilled water, two paper towels, and two plates.Lay one paper towel on a plate and spray distilled water on it. Put your seeds on the wet sheet and spread another one over them. Add extra moisture to the towels before covering them with the second plate. Keep the seeds in a warm, dry location.Monitor them every six hours and moisten the seeds when they look dry. Once your fem Biscotti strain seeds produce taproots, theyГўВҖВҷve already germinated. The process takes around one to five days.Growing Biscotti feminized seedsUnder the right conditions, Biscotti seeds can grow in outdoor and indoor settings. Consider installing a greenhouse if the environmental factors are unconducive. The seeds thrive in a wa

Candy Cane Cannabis Seeds by In House Genetics A fantastic offering from the In House Genetics library derived from crossing the legendary Slurricane #7 with Platinum Candy. The result is an amazing flower with beautiful, frosty buds that taste like gas covered grapes. Suitable for both, indoor and outdoor cultivation. Genetics: Slurricane #7 x Platinum Candy Type: Indica Area: Indoor / Outdoor Flowering Time: 60 - 75 Days Yield: Medium Stretch: Medium / Tall

fields.lineage: Bay Platinum Cookies
fields.eeatNarrative: GrandDaddy Purple Seeds Candyland A cross of Bay Platinum Cookies and Grandaddy Purp, Candyland is the Winner of the 2012 KushCon Cup for 1st place sativa. Living up to the hype, this cannabis strain has patients buzzing with excitement and produces smooth, tight, dense buds which are a pale shade of soft green and highlighted with a trace of darker green. Coated with tiny, pure crystals that fill up every nook and cranny, there is a subtle sexy array of long, dark golden hairs that beautifully highlight each nugget. Candyland's medical properties include pain management, muscle relaxation, mood enhancement, and is a fantastic social stimulus. Indoor: height 4' - 6' ( 120 - 180cm) flowering: 8 - 9 weeks start cycle (veg): 2 - 4 weeks finish cycle: 10 - 13 total weeks yield: 1.25 - 1.75 lbs / 1000w Outdoor: height: 6' - 8' ( 180 - 240cm) flowering: 8 - 9 weeks start date: June 1 finish date: Oct 1 yield: 1.25 - 2lbs / plant

Expect lingering woodsy, earthy, spicy dankness. Genetics: Exodus Cheese x Santa Marta Colombian Gold Type: Sativa 88% / Indica 12% Indoor Flower Time: 9 Weeks Outdoor Finish Nor Cal: Sept-Oct

fields.lineage: the many breeders we work with
fields.eeatNarrative: Exotic Genetix Seeds Cookies & Cream Regular Cannabis Seeds Cookies and Cream strain is a 50/50 hybrid bred by Washington-based Exotic Genetix. Resin monsters Starfighter F2 and the famed Cookies got mixed to create this outstanding marijuana variety. Phenos range from medium producing ice statues to wonderful yielding snow covered monoliths! The aromas reminds as if you placed a scoop of vanilla ice cream on top of a chocolate chip cookie, then rubbed it in OG. This marijuana variety is definitely not for the novice grower and should be lollipopped, de-larfed, and looked over with care within the first few weeks of flower. However, the rewards greatly outweigh any risk involved with growing her. Cookies & Cream cannabis seeds usually take 8-9 weeks to finish. Cookies and Cream took first place in the hybrid category of the 2014 Denver Cannabis Cup. Genetics: Mystery Cookies x Starfighter F2 Flowering Time: 56 - 63 Days Sex: Regular Type: 50% Indica / 50% Sativa Height: Medium - Tall Yield: Medium Heavy Producer Aroma: Creamy Vanilla Cookie Dough

fields.eeatNarrative: Reserva Privada Seeds Kandy Kush Feminized and Regular Marijuana Seeds Souvenirs Kandy Kush has OG flavour and Train Wreck nugs. This is a combination of high medicinal varieties, commercial yields, frostiness and lemony aroma. This mostly Indica hybrid is comparable to candy due to its sweetness. After 5th week heavy production will start and will be on till the end. Kandy Kush is well known for its resinous nature. fields.lineage: Sunset Sherbet Strain x Girl Scout Cookies Type
fields.eeatNarrative: Lemon Cherry Gelato Cannabis Seeds by Barney's Farm Seeds Lemon Cherry Gelato, the second release from the collaboration between Barneys Farm and Backpack Boyz, is a strain that immediately grabs attention with its name and heritage. This tantalizing hybrid is a fusion of Sunset Sherbet, Girl Scout Cookies, and a mysterious third strain, quickly gaining popularity across the US. In cultivation, Lemon Cherry Gelato responds well to training techniques, producing large yields of aromatic buds. Indoors, plants grow to 90-110 cm, while outdoor heights can reach up to 1.4 meters. With proper care, indoor yields can reach up to 600g/mГӮВІ, and outdoor plants can produce up to 1kg each. Indoor flowering lasts 60-65 days, with outdoor harvests typically around mid-October. Visually, Lemon Cherry Gelato is stunning. Its buds showcase a vibrant array of purples, greens, and oranges, all dusted with a frosty layer of trichomes. This visual splendor hints at the strain's intricate flavour, which delights with a fresh citrus and cherry aroma, complemented by a sweet, dessert-like undertone. This perfect blend of sweet and tangy makes it a gourmet experience. With THC levels reaching up to 33%, this strain promises a potent yet balanced high. The effects offer a balance of mental stimulation and physical relaxation, with an initial cerebral uplift that enhances creativity and mood, followed by a soothing body high. Genetics: Sunset Sherbet Strain x Girl Scout Cookies Type: 40% Sativa / 60% Indica Flowering Time: 60 - 65 Days Harvest month: 2nd-3rd week - October Indoor Height: 90 - 110cm Yield indoors: up to 600 gr/ГЈВҺВЎ Outdoor Height: up to 140cm Yield Outdoors: up to 1000 gr/plant Falvour: Sweet, lemon, Citrus, Cherry, Gas Aroma: Sweet, Citrus, Hints of Fresh Berries Effect: Relaxing, Uplifting, Euphoric THC: up to 33%

fields.lineage: the many breeders we work with
fields.eeatNarrative: Hypnotizing Highs from this Mesmerizing MarijuanaBud BasicsHypnotic and captivating, itГўВҖВҷs no wonder that MK Ultra Feminized was named for the notorious mental manipulation research that the CIA conducted in the 50s. Though those experiments were more than a little secretive (not to mention controversial), this weed is an open book.The hybrid lovechild of OG Kush and G13, this weed (also known as MKU) is a mix of two strains that might be considered contrasting. Indica-heavy, the latter lends her blissful body-stone blanket and the former gives this hybridher stress-relieving properties and euphoria. The combination can only be described as trancey as hell, mesmeric and excellent at bringing on tranquil, drowsy couchlock.For veteran smokers, this award-winning strain is a particular favorite - though after bagging 2003ГўВҖВҷs Best Indica at the High Times Cannabis Cup, and 2nd place in 2004, newer tokers are inclined to give these credentials a chance.Medicinal consumers are already on board, as MK Ultra Fem is a potent psychological relief from a variety of ailments, and a decent pain reliever due to her deeply relaxing properties and 21% THC content.Feminized and festive in all her trichome-laden glory, this earthy, floral weed will delight experienced cannabis cultivators and grow well even when those with little to no ability give growing a go. Outdoors, MK Ultra takes care of herself, and indoors a controlled environment is enough to have average yields in around 9 weeks.Flavor and Fragrance of MK Ultra FeminizedFloral and fragrant, MK Ultra Fem has a scent reminiscent of pine and damp earth, intensely tangy and certain to have you going back for more.This sweet and pungent aroma, when combusted, develops further into a creamy smoke with undertones of wood and a sugariness that lingers on the tongue and coats the mouth.EffectsHard-hitting and fast-acting, MK Ultra Feminized is no strain for newbies, and even veteran smokers should consider their dose before optin

The Real Seed Company Nepalese The Seed Company Nepalese charas needs little introduction, and this Nepalese is one of the Himalaya's finest charas cultivars. This line has it's roots in one of Western Nepal's most highly regarded mountain regions and has all the power, illuminating warmth, and duration you would expect from a quality Himalayan charas cultivar. There are two main phenotypes to be found: a large plant reaching up to 4m in height, and a shorter plant with wider leaves, reaching around 1.5m - 2m. The shorter "indica" phenotype is regarded as making the best quality charas. This Nepalese is one of the best pure Himalayan lines available and is highly recommended. Nepalese aroma is hashy and sweet scents, malty and fruity

fields.eeatNarrative: CBD #1 Cannabis Seeds by Ace Seeds Following continuous and lengthy effort and a great number of tests, Ace Seeds have successfully stabilised a high CBD strain. It comes from crossing Cannatonic S1 with ErdPurd, and then Cannatonic S1 reversed. CBD 1 shows traits of Indica with robust branches and wide leaves as well as average to high resistance to a multitude of pests and diseases. She is well suited for growing indoors and outdoors. An exquisite bouquet will delight consumers - a mixture between a ripe tangerine, sweet, floral and gummy flavours combined with piny and musky details. Calming and mood-improving, non-psychoactive effects that will steer you towards positive thoughts, non-intrusive and fitting for everyday activities. Genetics: Cannatonic S1 / ErdPurt x Cannatonic S1 Sex: Feminized Type: 60% Sativa / 40% Indica CBD: 13 - 17 % THC: 0.6 - 0.7 % Flowering indoors: 49 ГўВҖВ“ 56 days (7 - 8 weeks) Flowering outdoors: End of September Yield: Average - High

If youвҖҷre looking to knock out stress in a hurry, Purple Ice may be the strain for you. Potent and relaxing, this hybrid is good for any time of day. Slightly sativa-dominant, Purple Ice produces euphoric and focused effects in users. This strain is known for creating a calming, tingly sensation that begins in the head before traveling to the rest of your body. Purple Ice features a slight blueberry scent and a mellow taste, making it a great strain for new users.

fields.eeatNarrative: Potent in Purple, DonГўВҖВҷt Mess with ГўВҖВңThe UrkleГўВҖВқBud BasicsStriking in gorgeous purple shades, California native Purple Urkle Feminized is an Indica-leaning hybrid strain of mysterious origins, boasting heavy-hitting full-bodied effects that though slow to arrive, are devastating when they truly set in.Though this 80s herbГўВҖВҷs exact lineage is unknown, most believe that she shares genetics with Granddaddy Purple and is likely a phenotype of Mendo Purps, since the two share several characteristics - including their marvelous mauve coloration and earthy grape aromas.Visually captivating and flavorsome as she may be, the true Indica effects of this weed are her real selling point. With a THC content of between 22% and 26%, this ispotent pot with the ability to knock flat even the most experienced toker, though sheГўВҖВҷs a little roundabout in the way she goes about it.Beginning with a mellow but euphoric effect in the mind, this herb's body-stone soon follows to intensely and profoundly slow you down and relax every inch of you into a soft, jello-like mess - ideal for medical tokers looking for pain relief.Easy to germinate and easy to manage throughout her growth cycle, Purple Urkle FemГўВҖВҷs genetics, while secretive, are still decidedly Indica. Average-sized, this hybridstrain is great for beginners to ganja growing, and requires only the simplest environmental controls to thrive and yield a copious amount of weed ready for drying and curing.Flavor and Fragrance of Purple Urkle FeminizedWith a hefty nod to her roots, break apart the nugs of Purple Urkle Fem to be greeted with a dank and skunky earth aroma that subtly blends in a mix of grape and berry notes to great effect.EffectsAveraging at 22%, Purple Urkle Feminized can stretch up to a 26% THC content, so itГўВҖВҷs fair to say she'smighty potent weed, and can devastate even veteran smokers.Thehigh begins on the mellow side, swarming into the head on a wave of euphoria that lifts the mood and melts away everyday stres

fields.lineage:
> SKYWALKER KUSH (SKYWALKER X OG KUSH)

When people ask for a good yielding OG Kush variety they are talking about the Skywalker Kush! This is a very sought after clone in the United States and now we are very proud to present this strain to the masses
fields.eeatNarrative: Berry-Sweet Sativa for Soaring Cerebral EffectsBud BasicsAn unusual strain for many reasons, Skywalker Feminized is the Sativa-leaning hybrid result of breedingMazar, a famous landrace strainfrom the north of Afghanistan, and Blueberry, a highly-regarded, fruity Indica masterpiece.How and why their resultant love child tends more toward Sativa traits and effects is a mystery, but no one in the cannabis community could argue that this weed is anything short of delicious, dank and potent.As you can imagine, weГўВҖВҷre not looking too closely for an answer.Named Skywalker for reasons unknown, weГўВҖВҷve decided that the profound buzz of this ganja is too similar to the sound of a lightsaber to ignore - but by all means, draw your own conclusions.What we can say for certain is this pot takes her deliciously fruity aroma from her Blueberry parentage, and when broken apart, the scent released by these buds is beyond comparison.Of course, this herbtruly shines when toked. Heavy on the uplifting cerebral highs, youГўВҖВҷll find yourself humming with happiness when you light up a joint of this strain, before slowly slipping down to a deep and restful body-stone thatГўВҖВҷs calming and unmissable.Cultivating this cannabis is a simple and straightforward process. Though Skywalker Feminized thrives indoors where conditions can be controlled, sheГўВҖВҷll grow well enough in most locations, in most substrates, and is hardy enough to withstand the weight of her own massive colas without any additional support from you.In fact, with feminized seeds to remove the worry of pollination, all youГўВҖВҷre responsible for is keeping her warm, dry and well-trimmed. And drying and curing those tasty nugs for a stash thatГўВҖВҷs all your own.Flavor and Fragrance of Skywalker FeminizedAlthough a hybrid strain, Skywalker Feminized borrows her taste and aroma from one side of the family more than the other and is abundant with the sweetness of berries and fruit much like her parent strain, Blueberry.The muskiness t

Sour Pink Grapefruit perfectly combines the well known traits of both parents. Very vigorous and easy cultivation with huge yields of super frosty and dank buds. Cherry Cola AUTO Cannabis Seeds By FastBuds Seeds Cherry Cola Auto is a potent variety, with up to 25% of THC and well-balanced effects. The powerful high arrives quickly with incredibly relaxing effects, boosting your mood and leaving you stress-free and generally happy. Besides, it can be helpful with sore muscles, anxiety, and eating disorders. Perfect choice for those looking to start the day with their right foot! Thanks to the highest-class genetics, this vigorous autoflowering variety grows quickly, reaching up to 150 cm and yielding 500 - 600 g / m2 in less than 70 days. Cherry Cola Auto appears with a strong main cola with a few thick side branches around it. It's rather bushy, developing thin and narrow dark green leaves that turn into a beautiful pinkish light green color and are completely covered with trichomes by the time of harvest. The buds are dense, super frosty, and full of stunning cherry aroma and flavour. A tropical taste with a strong gaseous background fills your throat and grows stronger as you inhale. As you exhale, the gassy disappears, giving way to a sparkling flavor with intense hints of cherries, strawberries, and raspberries that cover the mouth and leave a strong berry scent throughout the room. A perfect strain for hash makers, extractors, and terpheads! Genetics: Cherry Cola Auto Type: Sativa 45% / Indica 55% Area: Indoor / Outdoor Flowering Time: 9 - 10 weeks Yield: 500 ГўВҖВ“ 600 gr/m2 Height: 90 - 150 cm Size: XXL THC: up to 25% CBD: < 1% Taste: Fruit, Coke, Cherry

fields.eeatNarrative: Ten Months, Ten Cannabis CupsBud BasicsTangie has more accolades and claims to fame than a dozen comparable strains combined. In the ten months that followed this herb's high-profile launch, she scooped up no less than ten Cannabis Cup awards. After which, this fabulously fruity marijuanamore or less wiped the floor with the competition at every subsequent event.True to her name, this is a fragrant and flavorful strain with one of the most characteristic sweet-citrus fragrances imaginable. Pick up on a batch of well-cured Tangie Feminizedfrom a fair distance and youГўВҖВҷd swear someone in the vicinity had recently been zesting ripe tangerines.Tangy, zingy and bursting with sugary sweetness, this is an irresistible specimen with a freshness all of her own.She's also a strain with daytime use written all over, courtesy of a Sativa-heavy composition and generous 20% THC content. Engineered by combining the genetics of California Orange and Skunk #1, Tangie is the ultimate crowd pleaser and an absolute joy in all types of social situations.As an added bonus, these buds also occasionally testfor a modest amount of CBD- a boon to all you therapeutic tokers out there!Growing your own isnГўВҖВҷt particularly challenging, though this is a strain that needs a lot of vertical space to do her thing. On the plus side, get it right and you could pocket as much as 17oz of super-sweet bud for every square meter of grow space in return.Flavor and Fragrance of Tangie FeminizedRight out of the jar, Tangie buds burst with beautifully sharp and sweet citrus aromas, combining zesty tangerines with juicy tropical fruits and a hint of pine freshness. All of which are intensified further when the buds are broken, complemented by waves of moist earth and classic dankness when burned.ItГўВҖВҷs more or less an identical story in terms of flavor, which is dominated by sweet and sour citrusthat lingers on the palate long after the exhale. fields.eeatNarrative: Off the RailsBud BasicsMexican, Thai and Afghani landrace varieties came together to create one of the most iconic new-generation hybrids in the history of commercial cannabis.Trainwreck is the kind of strain you donГўВҖВҷt need to be a seasoned connoisseur to both recognize and appreciate. Famed for combiningSativa-heavy genetics with a dizzying average 22% THC content, thereГўВҖВҷs nothing subtle or gentle about the way this weed gets to work.Energizing and uplifting at first, youГўВҖВҷre soon thrown into a world of all-things lazy, lethargic and sleepy. True to her name, Trainwreck Feminizedhas you flying along what seems to be a one-way track at breakneck speed, only to propel you into a brick wall and bring the whole thing to a crashing halt.Hence, this isn'twhat youГўВҖВҷd call an ideal daytime or productivity smoke. Nevertheless, a few tokes at a strategic time late in the afternoon can be just the thing to set you up for a dreamy evening on the couch.The enjoyment and appeal of this hard-hitting strain are furthered by an unmistakable aroma. Dominated by mouth-watering lemon-lime scents, thereГўВҖВҷs a sweet and sour freshness to Trainwreckyou simply will not find with any other strain out there.Every bit as unpredictable as a runaway freight train, THC levels can vary from 18% to more than 26%. YouГўВҖВҷre never quite sure what youГўВҖВҷre getting, so itГўВҖВҷs best to start out slow and take things from there. Lighter batches are well within the tolerance levels of novice users ГўВҖВ“ those erring towards the 26% THC side of the scale are to be approached with extreme caution.Flavor and Fragrance of Trainwreck FeminizedOnce youГўВҖВҷve experienced this fabulously fragrant strain firsthand, you can identify her from a mile away. This herb has the most distinctive sweet and sour citrus fragrance, which is unlike that of any other cannabis strain on the scene. The aroma of juicy lemons and limes immediately fills the room, coupled with a menthol-eucalyptus undertone that permeates everyth

fields.lineage: Super Skunk x White Widow Type
fields.eeatNarrative: Wonder Woman Cannabis Seeds by Nirvana Seeds Wonder Woman is an Indica dominant hybrid created by crossing Super Skunk with White Widow. The result is short in height plant that will flower as quickly as 56 days (depending on the phenotype). Wonder Woman is a great hash maker and is ideal for beginners. She produces big, sticky buds full of pungent and floral, sweet aroma. Another of her advantages is high resistance to cold and wet weather. Wonder Woman is extremely easy to grow and requires very little maintenance. She will reward you with a THC level of up to 19% and wonderful taste. Expect pungent and acrid flavours with a sweet floral background. The effects she provides are calming, upbeat, clear-minded and provoking creativity. Well recommended for anyone who enjoys keeping busy and remaining sharp. Wonder Woman will keep you mentally stimulated throughout the whole day! Medical patients may find this strain useful for improving clarity, relieving symptoms of depression, increased motivation, nausea and sickness and relieving stress. Genetics: Super Skunk x White Widow Type: Indica dominant Flowering time: 8 - 10 weeks Yield: 450 - 550 g/mГӮВІ Area: Indoor and Outdoor Height: Average sized plant Effect: Euphoric, Relaxed, Happy Medical use: Stress, Depression, Insomnia, Flavour: Sweet, Pungent, Skunk, THC: 13% - 19% CBD: 0.1% - 1%
